item.title: FDNY Firefighter Niels Jorgensen on 9/11
item.description: Niels Jorgensen responded to Ground Zero after the South Tower was struck, spending days searching for survivors. A story of service and sacrifice.

media:content.media:title: FDNY Firefighter Niels Jorgensen on 9/11
media:content.media:description: Niels Jorgensen responded to Ground Zero after the South Tower was struck, spending days searching for survivors. A story of service and sacrifice.

item.title: A Tribute to Those Who Served and Sacrificed
item.description: A respectful tribute to veterans and all who served, honoring their sacrifice, service, and lasting place in history.

media:content.media:title: A Tribute to Those Who Served and Sacrificed
media:content.media:description: A respectful tribute to veterans and all who served, honoring their sacrifice, service, and lasting place in history.

item.title: WWII Veteran Manny Carvalho on Patton
item.description: Manny Carvalho reflects on the motivation to fight behind General George Patton, offering a WWII veteran’s firsthand perspective on service and leadership.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veteran Manny Carvalho on Patton
media:content.media:description: Manny Carvalho reflects on the motivation to fight behind General George Patton, offering a WWII veteran’s firsthand perspective on service and leadership.

item.title: Ex-Marine Missions in Vietnam
item.description: A former Marine reflects on high-stakes missions in Vietnam, offering a firsthand account of service, leadership, and survival.

media:content.media:title: Ex-Marine Missions in Vietnam
media:content.media:description: A former Marine reflects on high-stakes missions in Vietnam, offering a firsthand account of service, leadership, and survival.

item.title: Robert Jeffrey’s Vietnam POW Story
item.description: Shot down on his first combat mission, Air Force pilot Robert “Bob” Jeffrey spent 2,611 days as a POW before returning home in Operation Homecoming.

media:content.media:title: Robert Jeffrey’s Vietnam POW Story
media:content.media:description: Shot down on his first combat mission, Air Force pilot Robert “Bob” Jeffrey spent 2,611 days as a POW before returning home in Operation Homecoming.

item.title: The Greatest Beer Run in History
item.description: A historical look at a remarkable wartime story shared by American Veterans Center.

media:content.media:title: The Greatest Beer Run in History
media:content.media:description: A historical look at a remarkable wartime story shared by American Veterans Center.

item.title: Major Jeff Struecker on Mogadishu
item.description: Former U.S. Army Ranger Major Jeff Struecker reflects on the 1993 Battle of Mogadishu, later depicted in the film Black Hawk Down.

media:content.media:title: Major Jeff Struecker on Mogadishu
media:content.media:description: Former U.S. Army Ranger Major Jeff Struecker reflects on the 1993 Battle of Mogadishu, later depicted in the film Black Hawk Down.

item.title: They Did Not Expect the Battle's Cost
item.description: A historical reflection on soldiers confronting unexpected losses in war, drawn from the American Veterans Center's account.

media:content.media:title: They Did Not Expect the Battle's Cost
media:content.media:description: A historical reflection on soldiers confronting unexpected losses in war, drawn from the American Veterans Center's account.

item.title: The Bizarre Things I Saw in Fallujah
item.description: A veteran reflects on unusual sights and experiences from Fallujah, offering a firsthand account of service and the realities of war.

media:content.media:title: The Bizarre Things I Saw in Fallujah
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on unusual sights and experiences from Fallujah, offering a firsthand account of service and the realities of war.

item.title: The One Thing That Still Haunts Me
item.description: A veteran reflects on a lasting memory from war and the personal impact of service.

media:content.media:title: The One Thing That Still Haunts Me
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on a lasting memory from war and the personal impact of service.

item.title: 101st Airborne Paratrooper Memories
item.description: A veteran of the 101st Airborne reflects on his memories as a paratrooper, offering a firsthand look at service, training, and wartime experience.

media:content.media:title: 101st Airborne Paratrooper Memories
media:content.media:description: A veteran of the 101st Airborne reflects on his memories as a paratrooper, offering a firsthand look at service, training, and wartime experience.
